scripts.build: bun run build:grid && bun run build:view && bun run build:view-rs:web
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/view-grid-ts test && bun run --cwd packages/view-react test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/view-grid-ts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/view-react typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/view-rs typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/view-py/web typecheck
